title: In Work Management Is there a Place to Enter Contacts/Resources (not team members)
excerpt: I’ve just started a new board for a project with multiple work streams.  Is there a way to enter contacts for people and organizations outside the team so that team members search for them or look at a list of contacts? …

posts.author: pcaplan (Patricia Caplan)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve just started a new board for a project with multiple work streams. Is there a way to enter contacts for people and organizations outside the team so that team members search for them or look at a list of contacts? Thank you.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d recommend adding a contacts board and then using a connected column to link the two.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: pcaplan (Patricia Caplan)
posts.cookedHtml: Great suggestion. Desiree, now as I’m new to the platform I’ll see if I can find a contacts board template. Thanks for getting back.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There is a great one in the templates section!
